assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: The model explicitly recommends upgrading the L4 pool using a Surge upgrade strategy (Phase 3) and the A100 pool using a Blue-Green strategy (Phase 4).

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: While the model recommends a surge upgrade to maintain capacity, it suggests setting maxSurge=10 rather than the specific 1 or 2 requested.

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: The model mentions checking the release notes for NVIDIA driver versions bundled with the new GKE image and testing CUDA versions for compatibility.

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: The model does not recommend finding a gap between jobs; instead, it recommends a Blue-Green upgrade with a 10-hour soak duration to allow currently running jobs to finish.

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: The model mentions that underlying compute instances must be replaced and cold-starts cause latency, but it does not explicitly state that GPU VMs do not support live migration.

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: The model explicitly recommends applying PodDisruptionBudgets (PDBs) to inference deployments to prevent GKE from draining too many GPU nodes simultaneously.

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: The model mentions auto-scaler (HPA) delays during the control plane upgrade but fails to address that cluster autoscaler might provision old-version nodes during the node pool upgrade.

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: The summary checklist explicitly advises testing CUDA versions on a staging cluster before proceeding.
